input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 37 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 3, "message": "3 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 4, "message": "4 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 5, "message": "5 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 9, "message": "9 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 5, "message": "5 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 3, "message": "3 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 3, "message": "3 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 58, "current_utilization": 67, "recommendation": "Projected full in 58 min. Consider: expedite discharges, divert CTAS 4-5."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's Hospital faces high demand with 37 incoming patients and is projected to reach full capacity in 58 minutes. Immediately activate isolation for respiratory, pre-alert cath lab for cardiac, infection control for GI, stroke code readiness for neuro, and crisis team for mental health clusters. To manage capacity, expedite discharges and divert CTAS 4-5 patients to Toronto General, Mount Sinai, or CAMH, all at 50% utilization.
